PowerShell($f = Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($f\) { "FOUND: $\($f.Source\)"; ffmpeg -version | Select-Object -First 1 } else { "ffmpeg NOT on PATH" }; $w = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($w\) { "winget available" } else { "winget NOT available" })

PowerShell($s = Get-Command soffice -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($s\) { "soffice on PATH: $\($s.Source\)" } else { "soffice NOT on PATH" }; $paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\LibreOffice\\program\\soffice.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\LibreOffice\\program\\soffice.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "INSTALLED at: $p" } })
